name: Save Faiss DB
description: Save Vector Embeddings to faiss db
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input

fields.name: fileNameCol
fields.title: File Name Column
fields.description: Column containing the source file name associated with each embedding for traceability and reference.

fields.name: pageNumberCol
fields.title: Page Number Column
fields.description: Column representing the page number or logical segment of the content used to generate the embedding.

fields.name: contentCol
fields.title: Content Column
fields.description: Column containing the textual content used to generate vector embeddings.

fields.name: directoryPathCol
fields.title: Directory Path Column
fields.description: Column specifying the directory path associated with each document or content source.

fields.name: embeddingsCol
fields.title: Embeddings Column
fields.description: Column containing vector embeddings to be stored in the FAISS index.

fields.name: base64ImageCol
fields.title: Base64 Image Column
fields.description: Column containing base64-encoded image data associated with the embeddings, if applicable.

fields.name: faissIndexName
fields.title: FAISS Index Name
fields.description: Name of the FAISS index to create or update with the provided embeddings.

fields.name: faissIndexDir
fields.title: FAISS Index Directory Path
fields.description: Filesystem directory path where the FAISS index files will be created and stored.

fields.name: dimension
fields.title: Dimension
fields.description: Dimensionality of the embedding vectors. Must match the size of the embeddings being indexed.
